title: rubus idaeus var. shikokianus
intro: Rubus idaeus var. shikokianus, also known as the Japanese raspberry or Shikoku raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant that is native to Japan. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of ellagic acid, which has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. shikokianus include its potential to protect against cancer, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
